characters.name: Aida
characters.description: Aidais a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. At first, he was known just as thePromoter(興行主,Kougyounushi). Aida is an average-looking man of older age. He has brown hair and visible wrinkles on his face. As a serious organizer of prize fights, he dresses in suits. Almost nothing is known about his personality. It can be said that he is a vindictive person who does not allow "inferior" people to act against him or his people. As a serious organizer of prize fights, he dresses in suits. characters.name: Bunken Kohakura
characters.description: Bunken Kohakurais a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. He's a member of the council ofOrgano. Kohakura, is pretty laid-back throughout the whole show, and unlike the rest of the Organo, openly sympathizes and respects Onishi's efforts to keep the city together. He comes across as one of the saner, gentler and more likeable members of the Organo, and amongst the few of the top brass willing to defend Onishi during the first arc of the show. But later he kills one of the other bosses, frames another, getting Ichise to finish him off, and finally takes over the Organo and defects to the Class, showing his true colours. characters.name: Eriko Kamata
characters.description: Eriko Kamatais one of theClass, the group of people who live on the "Hill". This first-rate expert in Texhnolyzation came to the city ofLuxto advance her studies. She is one who gaveIchisehis Texhnolyzed limbs. Also, Doc is the one whomKeigo Oonishitrusts outside theOrgano. She's calledDoc(ドク,Doku) by most characters. She is an attractive woman with long blonde hair and blue sterile and piercing eyes. Eriko usually has her fringe pulled to the side. She has pale skin and a slim figure with a very feminine shape. Her dressing style is not particularly special, except for her black, tight suit, which she often wore in the series. Eriko is quite cheerful, and loves to talk, especially on the subject of Texhnolyzation. She very much enjoys being aroundKeigo OonishiandIchise, even if they fail to be good company. More of a scientist than a doctor, she sees Texhnolyzation as a means of human evolution rather than medical treatment. While she is calmer and more sympathetic than most, Doc doesn't appear to be completely sane. She despises the people of theClassand doesn't really care for the people ofLuxeither. She simply wants to create the best Texhnolyze out there - one that will completely fuse with a human. While certainly genial, Doc is only interested in the pursuit and propagation of Texhnolyze technology, regardless of how it aids others. Despite her general cleverness, she occasionally shows a nervous, childish side. Eriko is quite cheerful, and loves to talk, especially on the subject of Texhnolyzation. characters.name: Gabe Elder
characters.description: TheGabe Elderis a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. He is the spiritual leader ofGabe. The elder isRan's grandfather and mentor. He's an older man, probably about 50 years old. The elder has long grey hair and visible wrinkles on his face. He is not a too slim person and his height is quite average. He wears something like a thick scarf around his neck. He is always dressed in a green apparel which symbolizes his high position in the village of Gabe. The Gabe Elder is a serious person with a conservative attitude to the traditions of the Gabe village. He believes that no one should fight the human destiny that appears inRan's mind. No matter how tragic the future of people is going to be, the Gabe Elder does not intend to do anything to stop it (in this regard, he is a complete opposite ofIchise). The Gabe Elder is a serious person with a conservative attitude to the traditions of the Gabe village. He believes that no one should fight the human destiny that appears inRan's mind. No matter how tragic the future of people is going to be, the Gabe Elder does not intend to do anything to stop it (in this regard, he is a complete opposite ofIchise). The elder is usually very stoic and serious, but he also seems to be quite a nice person who can show his gratitude even to strangers. It is shown whenKazuho Yoshiisaves his life from the assassins. The Gabe Elder welcomes him with cultural hospitality, and even tells Ran to led Yoshii to theLuxcity in the gratitude for saving them. It seems that his attitude to Yoshii was largely based on his principles. In spite of all, the Gabe Elder wasn't quite sure about the intentions of the mysterious newcomer. It is shown in their conversation, in which he ask Yoshi directly whether his appearance will have positive or negative effects. This also says that the elder is also a very wise person.

characters.name: Genji Kimata
characters.description: Genji Kimatais a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. He is the leader of theSalvation Alliance, an organisation opposed to the use ofTexhnolyzation. Kimata later addresses his remaining men in preparation for battle against theShapes. The ensuing battle is to be an affirmation of the ideals of the Salvation Alliance, one which will result in their spirit being “deeply etched into the souls of the citizens of Lux”. He goes on to formally confess his Texhnolyzation, pulling up his shirt to reveal the rotting flesh on his torso surrounding hisTexhnolyzedarm: Texhnolyzation “erodes not only a man’s body, but also his soul”. He proceeds to give permission for his members to leave if they’re too discouraged to fight alongside him. But rather than leave, the Alliance’s remaining members begin to chant in solidarity with their leader. The subsequent battle is brutal, a fight to the death for the Salvation Alliance.Keigo Oonishimeets with Kimata, but Kimata dismisses his advice to retreat: “this is a battle to show our spirit to our comrades in this city.” He’s determined to get to the opera house,Kano’s headquarters, even if he’s the last man standing. Kimata is eventually swarmed and killed by Shapes, but not before tearing a whole group of them apart with his bare hands. Even after the death of their leader, the Alliance refuse to retreat. They proceed to fight to their extinction, chanting “Soul! Body! Truth! Salvation! Vengeance!” as they make their final charge.

characters.name: Hal
characters.description: Hal, also romanized asHaru, is a character from the Texhnolyze anime series. Hal is a young man with a blond afro and tanned skin. He also has a Texnohlyzed left arm. There was an unusual relationship between Hal,ShinjiandYooko, who is in love with Shinji, and is loved by Hal. He couldn't accept Yooko not loving him. It ends just as badly, with Hal turning on Shinji out of jealousy. He grew hateful and became one of theShapes. It can be said that freedom in relationships that Shinji believed in brought a lot of pain to his friends. Yooko and Hal felt fine exercising this polyamorous situation when it benefited them but couldn't accept it when it didn't. In truth, they were not free. characters.name: Ichise
characters.description: Ichiseis the main protagonist of the series, Ichise is an extremely quiet 19 year old prize-fighter who was orphaned at an early age. After getting his arm and leg chopped off by his former promoter, he is selected byEriko Kamatato be the subject of her greatest experiment. He is a slim and well-built young man. Ichise has black hair of medium length. He usually wears a fringe on his forehead, but in one episode he had his hair slicked back. He has pale skin and blue eyes with an extremely cold and empty look. His facial expression almost always seems to be completely unmoved and devoid of any feelings. In the beginning, he was dressed in ordinary, indistinctive clothes. He often wore a long coat. In the later episodes, he wears a very nice black suit as part of the Organo. Ichise is tough, cool and violent. He has an odd tendency to go berserk at very inopportune times. Whenever something has angered him, he channels nearly all his energy in an effort to destroy whatever it is that has crossed him. He's not a typical main character because of his disposition. While not actively out to hurt anyone, he has little to no qualms about hurting people for even stopping him in the street. characters.name: Ichise
characters.description: Ichiseis the main protagonist of the series, Ichise is an extremely quiet 19 year old prize-fighter who was orphaned at an early age. After getting his arm and leg chopped off by his former promoter, he is selected byEriko Kamatato be the subject of her greatest experiment. He is a slim and well-built young man. Ichise has black hair of medium length. He usually wears a fringe on his forehead, but in one episode he had his hair slicked back. He has pale skin and blue eyes with an extremely cold and empty look. His facial expression almost always seems to be completely unmoved and devoid of any feelings. In the beginning, he was dressed in ordinary, indistinctive clothes. He often wore a long coat. In the later episodes, he wears a very nice black suit as part of the Organo. characters.name: Kano
characters.description: Kanois a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. He is the current leader of theClasssociety that tries to take over the town and put everyone in Texhnolyzed bodies. He is born from generations of selective inbreeding. AfterYoshii'srampage, Kano descends onto the city with his army of full-bodied cyborgs called Shapes to reshapeLuxaccording to his own ideology. He is very intelligent, charismatic and eloquent. Kano despises the other members of theClassfor their stagnant attitudes. He seems to really want to be believed and understood by others, and genuinely try to appeal to people with their rants. Kano uses the chaos to wipe out the remnants of Lux and replace them with his "perfect"Shapes, essentially bringing about a world of apathy. Kano drives the entire city of Lux to madness, reflecting the inner state of his mind. It can be said that Kano is a delusional solipsist with severe homicidal tendencies who won't entertain the idea that human beings are anything other than playthings produced by his mind. Also, he believes thatLuxitself is a reflection of his mind, and that humans are puppets or homunculi eroding it. A possible explanation for this may be the fact that he's the result of generations of selective inbreeding, designed to create the perfect ruler. He would qualify for some kind of self-appointed god, except that he doesn't believe that he's god, he believes that he is reality itself. Kano's voice always stays flat and emotionless, which just adds to his creepy nature. Kano's politeness and formal manner of speaking contrasts with his abominable actions and only emphasizes how insane he really is. He keeps to the shadows throughout much of the second arc, largely working through his proxies in Lux. He turned out to be a kind of genius and, in spite of the fact that he dies, actually accomplishes his mission despite all the efforts of the main characters. Normally, his decapitation would be a cause for celebration, but the fact that it happens after the damage has been done makes it a hollow victory at best. characters.name: Kazuho Yoshii
characters.description: Kazuho Yoshiiis a traveler who appeared inLuxfrom thesurfaceworld.Ranfirst takes Yoshii to the village ofGabe. Who he is, and for what purpose he has come to Lux, was a mystery for some time. However, he is more than what his gentle demeanor indicates. Intrigued by life in the city and the potential that the people of Lux appear to have, Yoshii decides to start a war among the factions in Lux to stir the passions of the residents. He is a brunette with short hair. Yoshii often wears a blue hat. He has a moustache under his nose and is one of the few characters to have a facial hair in the series. Yoshii is wearing a blue golf shirt and an orange jacket. He also wears orange pants and black gloves. Yoshii almost always carries his backpack, wherein holds many useful things, including a gun. A large part of his body is texhnolyzed. He usually has a nice smile on his face. Yoshii came from theSurfaceworld to see the city ofLux. He seems to be intrigued by humanity's emotions, and the way the city of Lux works. At first he seemed to be a very empathic and positive person with mysterious but good intentions. Soon it turned out that he has the nature of a sociopath who can easily kill people with a calm smile on his face. He proves himself to be as murderous as he is mild-mannered. At some point he starts to be a provocateur, who rebels against themselves all the groups in the Lux city. Yoshii has fun observing human's emotions and reactions. It takes a while before he is revealed as the villain of the first story arc. Yoshii came from theSurfaceworld to see the city ofLux. At some point he starts to be a provocateur, who rebels against themselves all the groups in the Lux city. Yoshii has fun observing human's emotions and reactions. It takes a while before he is revealed as the villain of the first story arc. Yoshii causes chaos to bring out the passions and the wills of the people of Lux, or so he claims. It's made even worse by his placid and rational demeanour throughout the whole event. Yoshii's main motive is probably that the upper world could not handle humans problems and ultimately just gave up. All the humans in the upper world have been reduced to ghosts who do the same things over and over out of habit, finding any change (even death, which they are all very close to) to be too much effort. characters.name: Keigo Oonishi
characters.description: Keigo Oonishiis the head of the Oonishi Office of theOrgano, a yakuza-like group that controls a significant part ofLux's economy. He also serves as the Organo's executive director/deputy chairman. While young and mistrusted, Oonishi is likely the most moral character in the show. He is often referred to as "the man who hears the voice of the city". Keigo Oonishi is a well-built man with a cool and strong eyesight. He has brown eyes and hair, which is always slicked back. Oonishi always wears his light grey suit, under which he wears a red shirt and a black tie. He is a strong, righteous and capable man. He unified organizations and formed Organo with the help of "the voice of the city". He commits his life to bring order and liberty to the city. Oonishi sold his legs to the Class in exchange for what amounted to starter money to work his way in to the Organo (hence why he has texhnolyze legs). His cool and collected personality and his competence have quickly accelerated his rise to the top within the Organo. He has a deep, authoritative voice. Onishii can be unscrupulous, being implicitly or explicitly shown to perform, allow, tolerate or even manipulate some fairly nasty events and people in their effort to try to safeguard Lux from self-destruction. Oonishi always wears his light grey suit, under which he wears a red shirt and a black tie. He is a strong, righteous and capable man. He unified organizations and formed Organo with the help of "the voice of the city". He commits his life to bring order and liberty to the city. Oonishi sold his legs to the Class in exchange for what amounted to starter money to work his way in to the Organo (hence why he has texhnolyze legs). His cool and collected personality and his competence have quickly accelerated his rise to the top within the Organo. He has a deep, authoritative voice. Onishii can be unscrupulous, being implicitly or explicitly shown to perform, allow, tolerate or even manipulate some fairly nasty events and people in their effort to try to safeguard Lux from self-destruction. characters.name: Keiichi Saginuma
characters.description: Keiichi Saginumais a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. Keiichi shows up as a young girl with short, blonde hair who wears a white dress. His real appearance is that of a tall elder man with ash blond hair who wears a gray suit with a white shirt and a red tie. His legs are bleeding due to his Texhnolyze. He always has a yellow umbrella opened over his head.

characters.name: Keitarou Mizuno
characters.description: Keitarou Mizunois a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. Mizuno, in the process of his coup d’état againstOonishi’s leadership for control of theOrgano, visits theSalvation Allianceto guarantee them compensation for their casualties from the arson “no matter what happens inside our organisation” – he heavily implies his intent to oust Oonishi, his attempt to gain favour with the Alliance extremely unsubtle. After Mizuno leaves,Genji Kimataand his assistant,Ken Inuiare very much dismissive of his visit. characters.name: Ken Inui
characters.description: Ken Inuiis a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. At some point, the Salvation Alliance falls victim to the phenomenon common to all the factions of Lux, with sixty of its members leaving them to joinKano’s army of Shapes. Amongst these is Kimata’s right-hand man, Ken Inui, who tells him that the reason they are leaving is “due to ideological evolution”, after having the opportunity to “encounter a greater being who is capable of realizing our ideals in a more evolved form”. He also informs Kimata that he has known about hisTexhnolyzedleft arm for a long time (confirming the rumours hinted at by Oonishi in episode 3). Kimata tries to defend himself, arguing that it was because of this that he was able to “grasp the evils of Texhnolyzation”. But Kimata’s second-in-command calls him “pathetic” for being unable to preach the ideals of the Union without hiding the truth of his arm. characters.name: Mana Oonishi
characters.description: Mana Oonishiis a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. Usually her facial expression is smiling and her eyes are completely empty, making her look like something like a doll. It's shown that Mana is a nearly catatonic "empty shell" and thus unable to provide either physical or emotional intimacy toKeigo Oonishi, her husband. They even sleep in separate beds. Because of that, he decided at some point to start sleeping with his secretaryMichiko Hirota. However, he loves Mana enough that he is very moved after her death. On the other hand, her attitude, devoid of any emotion, may be related to the fact that she knows that Oonishi prefers to sleep with another woman. In other words, it is unknown what was first: her "empty" attitude or Oonishi's romance with Michiko. characters.name: Michiko Hirota
characters.description: Michiko Hirotais a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. Her relationship withKeigo Oonishiis quite ambiguous. What at first seems to be him engaging in a tryst with Michiko turns out to be the love triangle between Keigo, Michiko andMana, with Keigo turning to Michiko because Mana is implied to have lost all contact with reality at this point. Mana ends up dead due to a hostage crisis, and he freezes out Michiko romantically due to his grief. And whatever possibility of the two becoming closer is shot down when Michiko is tortured so brutally, that she begs him to end her suffering. By the end of the series, she has been abused so much by a trio of remaining Luxites that she's barely responsive and only asks to be killed. Her relationship withKeigo Oonishiis quite ambiguous. characters.name: Prostitute
characters.description: TheProstituteis a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. The series does not say exactly whether she is a high-ranked prostitute or just a lover ofAida, a prize fight promoter. In any case, she was signed as a "prostitute" or a "lover" in the credits. She is a pretty woman with short brown hair. She paints her lips with red lipstick. She has a shapely and very feminine figure. She wears dresses and fur coats. It was shown in the series that she wears a neck protector, but it is not known for what reasons. Her right hand is artificial. As she appeared in only a few scenes in the series, little is known about her personality. It can be concluded that she is quite a mean woman who likes to get what she wants. In the case of the first episode, her object of desire turned out to beIchise. As she appeared in only a few scenes in the series, little is known about her personality. It can be concluded that she is quite a mean woman who likes to get what she wants. In the case of the first episode, her object of desire turned out to beIchise. She is also very cruel and vindictive, as she joyfully looks as friends of Aida, her employer or lover, brutally harm Ichise for hitting her. Her sadistic tendencies can also be observed in the scene where she has sex with Ichise and at some point, for unknown reasons, she decides to pierce his eyeball with her pointed fingernail (it is possible that she gets mad that the young fighter shows no emotion). However, it can be deduced that she has been a victim of violence many times in her life. She may have lost her right hand once because she wears a denture. She also wears a special neck protector. It is possible that experiencing a lot of violence in her life has made her a cruel and violent person.

characters.name: Ran
characters.description: Ranis a flower girl from the village ofGabechosen as her generation's seer. She is able to see the future and is revered by many people in the city, includingKeigo Oonishi. However, as the series progresses, she grows increasingly uncomfortable with her role after meetingIchise. In the 21st episode, it was said that her "real name" isTheoria. Ran is a young girl with a light complexion and dark yellow eyes. Ran has red hair, which she usually wears in pigtails that emphasizes her youth and naiveté. She is always seen wearing her maroon coat. Usually her facial expression are very calm and emotionless. Ran is often seen wearing a white fox mask and wherever she has been, a white flower is usually left behind. Ran is extremely calm, just like Ichise. Her face usually doesn't express any emotions. Ran often doesn't even answer questions when she doesn't want to. Ran is quiet, dignified, and always somber and depressive. While she is fairly self-sacrificing and dedicated to her role as a seer, she is also the most fatalistic of the cast, albeit for good reason. Ran is extremely calm, just like Ichise. While she is fairly self-sacrificing and dedicated to her role as a seer, she is also the most fatalistic of the cast, albeit for good reason. Her way of thinking is very difficult to define. Ran is technically the "big good" of the show, but given that she can see the future, andKazuho Yoshiiflat out asked her about it, it's all but outright stated that she knew who Yoshii was and still let him loose on Lux. She probably just believed that she can't fight fate as her village believed. But there is also a theory that she believed Yoshii was necessary to Lux's preservation in some way. Additionally, she often covers her own face with a mask, which makes it even more difficult to determine her emotional state. Her painted fox mask is deemed to be quite disturbing, considering that it makes her look very ominous. A quite important establishment is her depiction as a guide. She is shown explicitly guiding Yoshii with a wave of her hand. As a bit of trivia, if her wave looks peculiar, that is because she is using a traditional Japanese gesture to ‘follow me’ or ‘come here’. Ran’s role as a guide is very important to her character. Later, we see her guidingIchisethrough the sewers with a path of flowers. Towards the end, we realise her connection to the ‘voice of the city’, so she can be understood also as a kind of guide toKeigo Oonishiand the city as a whole. Ran's gift of foresight grants her insight intoLux's dark future, even though it pains her to see a future she's unable to change. During her conversation with Ichise, she admits that she would never want to have any more visions. She has a profound interest in Ichise who she prophesied to be the "destroyer" of the world. characters.name: Shinji
characters.description: Shinjiis a fictional character from the Texhnolyze anime series. He is the leader ofRacan, a group of young, city thugs and outsiders. At the very beginning, his main life goal seems to be simply "freedom". Shinji is usually a very balanced and carefree person with a calm and confident tone of voice. But there are situations in which he can get angry and even go as far to do a brutal actions. However, he shows some promise as theRacanleader, because he does not resort to violence unnecessarily and is capable of sensing the members' concerns about himself and about the group's future. Not seemingly knowing exactly what to do, however, he leads a "take-it-easy life". Shinji values "freedom" more than anything, and because of that, he does not restrict his girlfriendYooko's actions, so much to the extent that he appears indifferent to her. He even allows her for close physical contact with his best friendHal. Later, however, it turns out that Shinji was probably never so interested in Yooko at all when he manages to inviteMichiko Hirotato a "date". Shinji clearly shows her more interest than he ever shown to his own girlfriend, completely ignoring that Yooko makes it clear that she really cares about Shinji and is upset to see him bring Michiko to Racan's headquarters without any restraint.
